case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. TRAVON E. ANDERSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,222.34 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, TRAVON E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, TRAVON E. $1,222.34 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,222.34, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED PAYMENTS TO DEFENDANT SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN MADE DUE TO OTHER EARNED INCOME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, TRAVON E.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-13-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
